data.title: Training course on Post Market Surveillance & Complaint Handling Systems for Medical Devices added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. Topics include FDA CGMP expectations & requirements. Date: Jan 22 - Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: Dublin - A new training course on "Medical Devices: Developing Effective Post Market Surveillance and Complaint Handling Systems" is now available from ResearchAndMarkets.com. Scheduled to take place from January 22nd to January 23rd, 2026, this course will address U.S. FDA Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) expectations and requirements for Post Market Surveillance and Complaint Handling. The seminar will cover Section 522 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (FD&C Act) and relevant articles/Annexes of the EU's Medical Device Regulation. Participants can learn about key strategies and regulations concerning post-market activities to ensure compliance and product safety.

data.title: VCI Global partners with Mezzofy for enterprise asset supply, tapping into network with $8 billion voucher transactions.
data.description: Transitioning from the launch of the RWA Exchange to onboarding enterprise assets, marks a significant development. This shift leverages Mezzofy's established platform, which has facilitated over US$8 billion in voucher transactions.

data.title: USRA appoints Dr. Brandon Thorne as  Senior VP, Energy Programs effective January 12, 2026, emphasizing strategic focus.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Universities Space Research Association (USRA) revealed the selection of Dr. Brandon Thorne as the new Senior Vice President for Energy Programs. Starting his role on January 12, 2026, Dr. Thorne's appointment underscores USRA's commitment to Energy Programs and showcases their strategic priorities moving forward.

data.title: Zack Kass to headline ATD 2026 conference as keynote speaker in Alexandria, Va. - Jan. 14th. (Numbers: ATD 2026 conference, Jan 14, 2026)
data.description: Zack Kass, an AI strategist and executive business advisor, is scheduled to address talent development professionals at the largest global gathering in Alexandria, Virginia. The keynote speech will take place on Monday morning and is part of the Association for Talent Development's 2026 event.

data.title: Sunny unveils Workplace™ to address disconnect in workplaces. 'Energized by Design' paper outlines role of social connection in future work.
data.description: A recent white paper titled 'Energized by Design' uncovers the key role of social interaction in driving future work trends. The document, released by Sunny on January 14, 2026, highlights the significance of fostering meaningful connections in the workplace. Sunny, a company prioritizing purpose over profit, has introduced Sunny Workplace™ as a platform aimed at revitalizing team dynamics. This initiative emphasizes leveraging social connections as a catalyst for productivity and innovation in work environments.

data.title: Stowers Institute names Dan Devers, former Cerner Legal Chief, as new General Counsel, specializing in healthcare tech.
data.description: Experienced legal professional Dan Devers has recently joined the Stowers Group of Companies, bringing considerable expertise in healthcare technology, intellectual property, and enterprise legal strategy. His appointment was announced by the Stowers Institute for Medical Research based in KANSAS CITY, Mo. on Jan. 14, 2026. Dan Devers is set to contribute his wealth of knowledge and experience to the organization.

data.title: New TRC4 grant at UT Health San Antonio aims to reduce opioid treatment for burn victims by 90%, and decrease scar tissue; potential for major impact.
data.description: A recent development in therapy could lead to a substantial decrease in the use of opioids for pain management in burn patients by up to 90%. Additionally, this treatment has the potential to greatly reduce scar tissue formation caused by the injuries, which often impede normal function. This promising development comes with the hope of improving the quality of care for individuals suffering from burns, highlighting the potential to address both pain management and scar tissue concerns simultaneously.

data.title: Stonetrust expands to South Carolina from North Carolina, an AM Best "A" rated workers' comp carrier.
data.description: Stonetrust Commercial Insurance Company, a specialty workers' compensation carrier with an "A" rating from AM Best, has recently expanded its operations to South Carolina. This move comes after gaining a foothold in North Carolina the previous month. The company's growth highlights its commitment to serving more clients and strengthening its presence in new markets.

Syria interior ministry: ‘The Interior Ministry today cleared the way for a group of people who were involved in the SDF organization in the Sheikh Maqsood neighborhood of Aleppo city, after they voluntarily surrendered themselves and their weapons to the Syrian Arab Army forces.

data.title: MassNAELA supports ALR Commission's report proposing stricter health and safety standards at assisted living facilities in MA.
data.description: In Boston, the Massachusetts chapter of the National Academy of Elder Law Attorneys (MassNAELA) has expressed approval for a report by the Assisted Living Regulations Commission (ALR Commission) that highlights suggestions to enhance health and safety protocols in the state's assisted living facilities.

data.title: Steele Honda in St. John's, NL, offers used vehicles under $25,000 and select models under $20,000. Accessible options for every driver.
data.description: Steele Honda in St. John's, NL, declared on Jan. 14, 2026, that they are expanding their offerings to cater to a diverse range of customers by showcasing a variety of used car models priced below $25,000. The dealership is emphasizing their collection of select vehicles priced under $20,000, ensuring affordability for potential buyers. This initiative aims to make vehicle ownership more attainable for a wider audience. The promotion includes a restricted quantity of these budget-friendly vehicles, highlighting Steele Honda's commitment to providing options for every type of driver.
